chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 308 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2666/2025 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1302/2024 12.12.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for respondent 1. Granted. 2-3. By consent the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
